summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification for 10 listed refs. No shared canonical was selected because the job is an inventory shard. Security-sensitive refs are scoped to route_security; all unrelated non-security PRs are kept open with conservative non-mutating classifications. No close, merge, label, comment, or fix action is planned.

actions.reason: Open, focused, non-security PR with proof; keep related to the already-closed ChatGPT Responses content-type fix family rather than closing or merging in plan mode.
Docs-only provider guide needs real behavior proof, but low-signal closeout is disabled; keep as an independent maintainer-review item.
Security-sensitive item is out of ProjectClownfish backlog cleanup scope and should be routed to central OpenClaw security handling.
Open docs PR is paired with open docs issue #83390 and should remain available for maintainer review.
Open, focused media bug PR is related to prior media retention work but has unique remaining scope, so it should not be closed in this inventory plan.
Open PR changes a security-boundary-adjacent voice provider bridge and has security-shaped review evidence, so it is out of ProjectClownfish mutation scope.
Open voice-call behavior PR is not a duplicate of the other inventory items and should remain an independent maintainer-review item.
Open Matrix PR is directly paired with open issue #83142 and has useful focused code; keep it related and open for maintainer review/update.
Open PR remains related to the poll-send false-positive family with unique remaining scope, so it should not be closed as superseded in this plan.

Open Feishu PR is related to the already-handled Feishu streaming-card family but has conflict and follow-up context; keep non-mutating rather than closing a useful contributor PR without a replacement path.
